output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?artist WHERE {
  wd:Q15932023 wdt:P179 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P577 ?season_date .
  FILTER(year(?season_date) = 2012)
  .
  ?episode wdt:P179 ?season .
  ?episode wdt:P658 15 .
  ?episode wdt:P532 ?performer .
  ?episode wdt:P4588 ?score .
  ?episode wdt:P842 ?song .
  ?song wdt:P175 ?artist .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?artist wdt:P570 ?death_date
  }
  .
}
ORDER BY ?score
LIMIT 2

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?artist WHERE {
  wd:Q15932023 wdt:P179 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P577 ?season_date .
  FILTER(year(?season_date) = 2012)
  .
  ?episode wdt:P179 ?season .
  ?episode wdt:P658 15 .
  ?episode wdt:P532 ?performer .
  ?episode wdt:P4588 ?score .
  ?episode wdt:P842 ?song .
  ?song wdt:P175 ?artist .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?artist wdt:P570 ?death_date
  }
  .
}
ORDER BY ?score
LIMIT 2
```

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

} ORDER BY ?score
LIMIT 2

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?artist WHERE {
  wd:Q15932023 wdt:P179 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P577 ?season_date .
  FILTER (year(?season_date) = 2012) .
  
  ?episode wdt:P179 ?season .
  ?episode wdt:P658 15 .
  
  ?episode wdt:P532 ?performer .
  ?episode wdt:P4588 ?score .
  
  ?episode wdt:P842 ?song .
  ?song wdt:P175 ?artist .
  
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?artist wdt:P570 ?death_date } .
} ORDER BY ?score
LIMIT 2
